next_steps: Perform serologic testing for Trypanosoma cruzi IgG
Obtain ambulatory ECG (Holter monitor) to quantify ventricular arrhythmia burden
Perform genetic testing for cardiomyopathy panels (specifically looking for genes associated with LVNC or conduction system disease)
Consult with infectious disease specialist regarding Chagas management
Proceed with ICD implantation for secondary prevention
Screen patient's family for potential T. cruzi exposure if serology is positive
